title: PlasticGun
description: A gun mod - fully server side with Polymer
body:
# Better Bullets and Weapons Mod

Enhance your game with a diverse range of bullets, guns, grenades, armors and shurikens! This mod adds new items to diversify your arsenal and upgrade your tactical options.
It will improve your PvP experience.

<details>
<summary>Client sided installation</summary>
To improve controls, you can install the mod on the client. Doing so will mess up the textures for an unknown reasons.
</details>



## Bullets

### Batch 1: Better Bullets First
- **357 Magnum**: 
  - *Damage Coefficient*: 1.4
